top_signals.title: Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75%
top_signals.summary: Deal between US and Iran has pushed oil prices down and eased inflationary risk to UK economy
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: A Return to $3 Gasoline? Here’s What It Will Take
top_signals.summary: Oil prices have plummeted following news of a US-Iran deal that is meant to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but US drivers probably will have to wait a while for cheaper gasoline. Traders and analysts say that prices are unlikely to fall to pre-crisis levels until stockpiles of crude oil and gasoline are replenished, which probably won’t happen before the end of 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ambition to end era of ‘outsourcing by default’ as government looks to bring cleaners and security staff in-house
top_signals.summary: The government has published new guidance to provide a route for bringing key services back in-house and get the absolute best results for taxpayers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Biotech Kardigan Rises Nearly 2% After $400 Million IPO
top_signals.summary: Kardigan Inc. shares edged up nearly 2% in its trading debut, after the heart-health focused biotech raised $400 million in an initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ledn to add Tether Gold as loan collateral, expanding Bitcoin-backed lending model
top_signals.summary: Ledn’s planned addition of Tether Gold lending comes as tokenized commodities expand, with the sector accounting for nearly 17% of the $43 billion RWA market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Nuclear watchdog chief pitches ‘leaner’ UN in secretary-general bid
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: crude stocks in US Strategic Petroleum Reserve fall to lowest level since 1983
